## Summary

Adds a focused action plan for Issue #1024.

This is separate from PR #1023. PR #1023 maps Volume VII governance to admission enforcement. This PR documents the remaining implementation lanes for the unfinished Revise work.

## Covers

- candidate quality detector refinement
- unsupported written-number detection
- blocked-card retention policy
- Quality Review Permission UX
- admin-only repair workflow
- Revise CostOps and telemetry follow-through
- production acceptance checklist

## Related issues

- #1024
- #998

Adjacent but separate streams remain #1021, #841, #843, and #1010-#1015.

## Validation

Docs-only PR. No runtime behavior changed.
